semantic.role: Build automation script for the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Compile TypeScript source to JavaScript using the TypeScript compiler (tsc).
Copy AST language rule files (YAML) from source to dist directory.
Copy asset templates (prompts, schemas, views, etc.) to dist directory while excluding __mocks__ directories.
Remove all __mocks__ directories from the resulting dist folder to avoid shipping test-only code.
Set executable permissions on the CLI entry point (dist/cli/index.js).
outOfScope: Any runtime logic of ArchSpine itself.

English.purpose: This script is the authoritative build pipeline for the ArchSpine project. It orchestrates compilation, asset copying, and cleanup steps necessary to produce a ready-to-run distribution package.
English.context_and_audience: Written for developers and maintainers of ArchSpine who need to build the project from source. It assumes familiarity with Node.js, TypeScript, and the project's directory structure.
key_takeaways: Executes 'tsc' to compile TypeScript into JavaScript.
Copies AST rule files (YAML) and all assets to the dist directory.
__mocks__ directories are excluded both during copy and removed post-copy to keep the distribution clean.
The CLI entry point is made executable (0o755).

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该脚本是 ArchSpine 项目的权威构建流水线。它协调编译、资产复制和清理步骤，以生成可直接运行的发布包。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要从源码构建 ArchSpine 的开发者与维护者。使用者需熟悉 Node.js、TypeScript 及项目目录结构。
key_takeaways: 运行 'tsc' 命令将 TypeScript 编译为 JavaScript。
将 AST 规则文件（YAML）及所有资产复制到 dist 目录。
复制过程中排除 __mocks__ 目录，并在复制后将其从 dist 中删除，确保发布包洁净。
CLI 入口文件被设置为可执行权限（0o755）。
